case_title: QUALITY CELLULAR, INC. VS FARZIN KAVEH DBA AUTO SYMPHONY et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO FARZIN KAVEH RETURNED SIGNED. (AUTO SYMPHONY)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY QUALITY CELLULAR, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FARZIN KAVEH DBA AUTO SYMPHONY HEDAYAT KAVEH DBA AUTO SYMPHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
